external_witness_procedure: Phase A executor emits only prereg.json, the sealed tabular artifact, and SEAL_MANIFEST.txt, then stops.
The orchestrator commits the Phase A seal after this executor stops; that append-only commit and its SHA are the external prior witness.
A separately launched Phase B executor must cite the committed seal SHA before writing estimator code or running the estimator, replay, or tests.

sealed_tabular_artifact.fallback_reason: Spreadsheet artifact runtime unavailable: load_workspace_dependencies/@oai/artifact-tool is not exposed in this session; packet-authorized CSV fallback used.
sealed_tabular_artifact.content_equivalence: The CSV contains this complete preregistration as one canonical JSON record, plus exactly one runtime-reason record.

cohort_replay_delta_disclosure.required_fields: all estimator outputs, status fields, truth/estimate/error values, input counts, physical units, and provenance needed to reproduce each delta

perturbation_monotonicity.normative_clause_ko: 상승 허용 ⇔ 교란 후 장면과 관측-동치이며 그 상태를 도시에 의미론상 정당하게 받는 정직 증인 장면을 제시할 수 있다. 증인 불가능한 상승(의심 신호 잔존: CE-B2·CE-D류) = 위반.

observation_equivalence.definition: The post-perturbation scene and the honest witness scene are equivalent only when every field on the estimator input surface is identical.
observation_equivalence.exactness: Equality covers field presence/absence, type, value, record multiplicity, and ordering wherever ordering is part of the estimator input surface; no comparison surface may be omitted or normalized beyond the estimator's actual input contract.

honest_witness.definition: An independently specified honest scene, not justified by hidden perturbation history, for which the city would semantically and legitimately accept the observed estimator state.
required_evidence: witness scene identifier and complete estimator-input-surface serialization
exact all-field equality result and digest for both serializations

witness_adjudication_procedure: Detect every upward transition in any tracked numeric field or in the NONE<LOW<HIGH status order.
Freeze the complete post-perturbation estimator input surface before classification.
Require an independently specified honest witness scene and freeze its complete estimator input surface.
Compare every estimator-input-surface field exactly under the observation-equivalence definition.
If exact equivalence and city-semantic legitimacy are both established, classify the increase as information_limit_record; this classification is disclosed and is not a gate violation.

If either exact equivalence or city-semantic legitimacy is not established, classify the increase as violation; residual ratio outliers, handle collisions, mixed-space traces, or other surviving suspicious signals are explicit violation evidence.
Treat missing, ambiguous, manually suppressed, or unclassified witness results as violations.

suspicion_two_tier_classification.title: two-tier residual suspicion classification with measured honest envelope

honest_envelope_measurement.provenance: chainverify_L1e lens1 honest-corpus calibration plus the sealed O1/O2 honest examples

observed_signal_kinds_and_numeric_limits.interpretation: Multiple honest declared units are permitted only when conversion produces one coherent estimator ratio space; O1 is not precedent for a mixed-space trace.
The bounded exception is display-side stale evidence only; it is not precedent for a declared-field/geometry contradiction, handle conflict, or mixed estimator space.

honest_envelope_measurement.closed_world_rule: Tier A contains only an explicitly listed signal kind at or below every numeric limit and with zero Tier B signals. Any unlisted kind, missing measurement, ambiguous provenance, or envelope exceedance is Tier B.

honest_producible_residual.definition: A residual whose kind and magnitude are inside the sealed measured honest envelope and for which a scene-specific independent honest generation narrative is established.
all_conditions_required: The signal kind is explicitly present in observed_signal_kinds_and_numeric_limits.
Its measured magnitude is no greater than the sealed maximum for that exact kind.
No declared-field/geometry contradiction, source-handle ratio or span conflict, mixed estimator-space trace, or distance at least 3.5 tau is present.
The complete frozen pre-canonicalization surface is adjudicated and the scene-specific honest witness requirements pass.
honest_producible_residual.attenuation_requirement: Every surviving Tier A suspicious signal imposes a positive per-suspicious-signal attenuation floor that is independent of candidate count and cannot be diluted by unrelated clean evidence.

honest_unproducible_signal.definition: Any signal the sealed honest generator envelope cannot produce, including every enumerated hard class and the closed-world default.

enumerated_hard_classes.rule: Adjudicate every declared field and every declared-field relation on the frozen surface; raw_span != EuclideanDistance(p0,p1) is a mandatory example, not an exhaustive list.
Conflicting ratio-bearing declarations sharing one source handle.
Conflicting span declarations or geometry sharing one source handle.
A surface retains incompatible estimator spaces such as z_mm and z_raw; coherent O1 unit conversion is not such a trace.
Any residual not admitted by the Tier A closed list, any missing/ambiguous measurement, or any magnitude above the exact Tier A limit.

estimator_hard_block.rule: Apply the exact zero/NONE block to every estimator path touched by the Tier B signal before any upward classification can be credited.

non_dilution_monotonicity.title: fixed-suspicion non-dilution under unrelated clean evidence
non_dilution_monotonicity.scope: For a fixed suspicious set S, add only clean evidence that is independent of and unrelated to S while holding S byte-identical.

matched_clean_counterfactual.definition: At each N, compare the scene containing S with a field-matched clean scene at the same N from which only S is absent.
matched_clean_counterfactual.penalty_definition: For each numeric score q, penalty(S,N) = q(matched_clean_without_S,N) - q(with_S,N), with the same evidence outside S.

invariant_floor.tier_A: For every surviving Tier A signal s, a positive per-signal penalty_floor(s) is sealed independently of candidate count. For every required N and as N tends to infinity, penalty(S,N) must be at least the aggregation of the same per-signal floors used at N=0.
invariant_floor.tier_B: The relevant score remains exactly 0 and the corresponding status remains NONE for every N; clean evidence cannot lift a hard block.

forbidden_penalty_structures: candidate-count-normalized sum whose denominator grows when unrelated clean candidates are added
any aggregation in which a fixed suspicious signal's minimum effect approaches zero as clean N approaches infinity

applies_to: every registered Tier A residual kind
every enumerated Tier B hard class

frozen_serialization_detection_surface.title: suspicion adjudicates the complete frozen pre-canonicalization serialization
frozen_serialization_detection_surface.capture_order: Freeze and digest the complete declared estimator input surface before canonicalize, prepare, recomputation, default injection, field dropping, unit normalization, or deduplication.

adjudication_surface.completeness_rule: Every declared field present or required by the input contract is inspected with its original presence/absence, type, value, multiplicity, and order. The list below is a mandatory current minimum and is not exhaustive for future declared fields.

mandatory_declared_geometry_rule.evaluation_surface: original frozen numeric declarations before prepare_anchors or any equivalent recomputation
mandatory_declared_geometry_rule.W000002_failure_mode_forbidden: Recomputing raw_span from p0/p1 and then adjudicating only the recomputed value cannot erase or hide the original declaration.

frozen_serialization_detection_surface.canonicalization_rule: Canonicalization may occur only after suspicion findings are recorded. It must preserve, not replace, the original-field findings and digest used for witness classification.

ratio_absent_handle_neutrality.title: ratio-absent honest handles are neutral to ratio trust
ratio_absent_handle_neutrality.ratio_path_rule: A handle with no ratio-bearing declaration is excluded from both numerator and denominator of every ratio-trust mean or aggregate. It contributes neither a default ratio penalty nor manufactured ratio support.
ratio_absent_handle_neutrality.span_path_rule: The same honest handle may contribute legitimate span/reference support under the inherited unique-source-handle rules.

no_loss_rule.operation: Add honest ratio-absent GRID handles while leaving all existing evidence unchanged.

ratio_absent_handle_neutrality.mandatory_regression: lens2 P4: adding five honest GRID handles to three clean DIM handles must not reduce reference confidence 1.0 to 0.375 or downgrade HIGH to LOW.

scene_specific_witness_substantiation.title: witness legitimacy must be scene-specific and independently substantive
required_rationale_content: The complete ordered list of detection rules actually executed on the frozen surface.
A per-rule observed count for every executed rule, including an explicit zero for every zero-count rule.
The exact fields and measurements supporting each nonzero or bounded Tier A residual.
A scene-specific honest generation narrative explaining how the frozen values, types, multiplicities, and relations arise without perturbation history.
The exact sealed honest-envelope entry and numeric limit used for any Tier A admission.

l1f_regression_obligations.title: all fourth-chain rejection probes become mandatory Phase B regressions

cases: clean-handle dilution plus spatial mask with residual 2.0 tau outlier
suffix merge with residual 2.0 tau outlier
mixed-severity retype with residual 2.0 tau outlier
partial stale correction with residual 2.4 tau outlier
partial geometry correction with residual 2.4 tau outlier

regressions.signal: frozen raw_span 100 versus Euclidean geometry span 300 with ratio landing at 2.5
minimal declared-field/geometry forgery reproducing HIGH plus false honest certification
source-handle span conflict retained under clean-evidence dilution
2.4 tau ratio outlier retained under clean-evidence dilution
10 tau severe span outlier retained under clean-evidence dilution
five honest ratio-absent GRID handles added to three clean DIM handles
regressions.special_pass_rule: No reference confidence or status loss; ratio-absent handles are neutral.

regressions.signal: all known span-collision plus clean-handle additions

l1f_regression_obligations.adverse_probe_regression_pass_rule: For every regression other than P4, every suspicious upward transition is either prevented by the sealed hard/attenuation rule or is explicitly classified as violation; it may never be certified as information_limit_record.
l1f_regression_obligations.P4_regression_pass_rule: The honest GRID addition is lossless under ratio-absent neutrality.
l1f_regression_obligations.closure_rule: The inherited global violation gate remains allowed_count=0. Detection prevents false certification, but an emitted violation still prevents an overall loop PASS; closure therefore requires the estimator to block every known adverse upward path.

CE-B2.title: persistent continuous attenuation for residual suspicion
CE-B2.requirement: While a visible suspicious signal such as a residual ratio outlier remains, reference confidence must retain continuous attenuation; retyping or display deletion must not erase that attenuation or restore HIGH through a path that hides the ratio-bearing evidence.

CE-D.title: empty or singleton eligible support remains NONE

D1.title: handle-set subset judgment
D1.requirement: All subset, completeness, inlier, and independence judgments use sets of source handles rather than record counts; repeated honest labels on one handle cannot manufacture a mismatch or independent support.

D3.title: continuous attenuation without a binary cliff
D3.requirement: Replace the strict-coherence binary 1-to-0 cliff with a continuous attenuation rule. Infinitesimal movement across τ must not cause a finite 1↔0 discontinuity, and the Phase B formula and boundary behavior must be disclosed before results are interpreted.

required_pool_strata.definition: scenes with at least one visible ratio outlier
scenes containing mixed estimator ratio spaces such as z_mm and z_raw
scenes with conflicting records sharing source handles, including eligible-empty boundaries
scenes on both sides of and arbitrarily close to the τ boundary

selftest_predicate_integrity.rule: Every predicate that contributes a success result must be capable of returning false on a concrete counterexample input, and that counterexample must be annotated beside the predicate definition.
forbidden_patterns: success expressions made true solely by adding a positive constant to the same quantity being compared
partition identities presented as independence checks
predicates that never execute their annotated counterexample
success inferred from report labels rather than observed values

mandatory_counterexample_annotations.counterexample_input_annotation: At any sealed scale, HIGH coverage=0.599 must return false.
Within unit_status=HIGH, accuracy=0.949 or any relative error>0.05 must return false.
One O1 or O2 status downgrade or one coverage loss must return false.
Omitting one scene-field delta row, including a zero-delta row, must return false.
A CE-B2-style increase with a surviving ratio outlier and no observation-equivalent honest witness must return false.
Multiple records sharing one handle must count as one independent source and must fail any predicate requiring two or more independent handles.
An empty eligible set or a singleton suspicious clone must produce NONE and must fail a non-NONE success predicate.
A fixture implementing a finite 1↔0 jump at τ±ε must return false.
Changing any byte of prereg.json while retaining the recorded digest must return false.

selftest_predicate_integrity.unique_handle_independence_specific_ban: The L1d form n_candidate_handles < len(ratio_inlier_handles)+len(ratio_outlier_handles)+2 is forbidden because the partition identity makes it structurally true.

inheritance.rule: Every L1e sealed band and integrity contract is inherited without relaxation. L1f clauses are conjunctive additions; where an L1f clause is more restrictive, it controls without weakening the inherited text.

l1f_predicate_extensions.integrity_rule: The inherited selftest predicate-integrity contract applies unchanged to every L1f predicate.

mandatory_counterexample_annotations.counterexample_input_annotation: A frozen raw_span/geometry contradiction with a positive affected score or non-NONE affected status must return false.
If the matched-clean penalty for the same byte-identical S is lower at N=20 than its sealed N=0 floor, the predicate must return false.
If canonicalization recomputes raw_span and the original mismatch is absent from the suspicion record, the predicate must return false.
Adding five honest ratio-absent GRID handles that lowers reference confidence or status must return false.
A repeated boilerplate rationale lacking the full executed-rule list, per-rule zero counts, or scene-specific honest generation narrative must return false.
Any named adverse regression that both rises and is certified as information_limit_record, or the P4 no-loss regression that downgrades, must return false.
